message:
feat: Add mount path remapping to JS polyfills and atob/btoa support

- Add Docker-style mount path remapping (_remapPath) to node_polyfill.js
  - Parse __EDGEBOX_MOUNTS env var from host
  - Apply remapping to all fs operations (readFileSync, writeFileSync, etc.)
  - Longest guest path match wins for nested mounts
- Add atob/btoa base64 polyfills to runtime.js for QuickJS
- Update benchmark results
